entities.name: CHICKPEA
entities.description: The legume species Cicer arietinum studied for seed size inheritance

entities.name: SEED SIZE
entities.description: The phenotypic characteristic being analyzed for inheritance patterns in chickpea

entities.name: GENERATION MEANS ANALYSIS
entities.description: The statistical method used to study the inheritance of seed size using parents, F1, F2, and backcrosses

entities.name: GENETIC VARIATION
entities.description: The diversity in gene frequencies and expressions within the studied chickpea crosses

entities.name: ADDITIVE GENE EFFECTS
entities.description: The cumulative effect of alleles that contributed the major part of genetic variation for seed size

entities.name: NON-ADDITIVE GENE ACTION
entities.description: Genetic effects including dominance and interaction that slightly influenced seed size expression

entities.name: DOMINANCE
entities.description: A type of non-additive gene action where one allele masks the effect of another

entities.name: ADDITIVE X DOMINANCE INTERACTION
entities.description: A specific type of non-additive gene action affecting seed size

entities.name: NARROW-SENSE HERITABILITY
entities.description: The proportion of phenotypic variance due to additive genetic variance

entities.name: GENETIC GAIN
entities.description: The expected improvement in the trait value after selection

entities.name: EFFECTIVE FACTORS
entities.description: The minimum number of genes or loci controlling the seed size trait

relationships.description: used to study the inheritance of
